query:
SELECT source_id, COUNT(*) as total_artigos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='artigo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as artigos_raiz,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='paragrafo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paragrafos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='inciso' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incisos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='alinea' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as alineas
FROM regulatory_articles
GROUP BY source_id
ORDER BY source_id;
command:

SELECT source_id, COUNT(*) as total_artigos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='artigo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as artigos_raiz,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='paragrafo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paragrafos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='inciso' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incisos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hierarchy_level='alinea' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as alineas
FROM regulatory_articles
